title: Elysium Spa Winter Spices Epsom Salts - Cinnamon, Ginger & Spiced Orange
features: 8 UNIQUE SCENTS TO MATCH EVERY MOOD: Choose from Winter Spices, Star Gazing, Mint Madness, and more. Whether you're craving a cosy, warming bath on a cold evening or a refreshing citrus soak to brighten your mood, there's a scent to suit you. Perfect for creating a calming atmosphere at home.

100% NATURAL EPSOM SALTS FOR MUSCLE RELIEF: Elysium Spa bath salts are packed with natural Epsom salts that are known to ease muscle aches and pains. Ideal for a relaxing muscle soak after a workout or a long day, these salts melt away tension, leaving your body feeling refreshed and rejuvenated.

PERFECT POST WORKOUT RECOVERY: After an intense session at the gym or a challenging run, a muscle soak with these Epsom salts will help reduce soreness and fatigue. The natural salts penetrate deep into the muscles, providing relief and helping you bounce back faster.

IDEAL FOR FOOT SOAKS: Not just for the bath, these Elysium Spa salts work wonders in a foot soak too. Soothe tired, aching feet with a revitalizing foot bath. Perfect after a long day on your feet or to refresh your legs after a walk or hike. Simply add a handful to warm water and relax.

RESEALABLE 450G BAGS FOR EASY USE: The convenient, resealable packaging ensures your Epsom salts stay fresh and ready for use. Perfect for multiple baths or foot soaks, these handy bags make storing your salts simple and hassle-free, so you can enjoy a spa-like experience at any time.
description: Product Description Transform your bath time into a luxurious, spa-like experience with the Elysium Spa Limited Edition Epsom Bath Salts. Infused with 100% natural Epsom salts, these bath salts provide a soothing and revitalizing soak that helps to relax your muscles, ease tension, and leave you feeling refreshed. Choose from eight indulgent scents, each designed to lift your mood and make every bath feel special. Whether you’re looking for a warming winter soak or a fruity, revitalising burst, Elysium Spa has the perfect scent for you. The natural benefits of Epsom salts are well-known for their muscle-soothing properties, making them ideal for a post-workout muscle soak or a calming bath after a long day. Elysium Spa bath salts are also perfect for a foot soak, helping to relieve tired, aching feet after a day on your feet. The resealable 450g bags are perfect for maintaining freshness and allowing for multiple indulgent soaks whenever you need a little escape. Whether you're looking to ease muscle aches, enhance relaxation, or simply enjoy a luxurious bath experience, these Epsom salts for bath and foot soaks are just what you need. From the warming scents of winter spices to the calming notes of chamomile and jasmine, every soak is a chance to unwind and rejuvenate. Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum Directions Add approximately 2 handfuls to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Elysium Spa Epsom Salts a chance to soften the skin and be absorbed. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
